name: signAndSubmit
title: Sign and Submit Transaction
description: Sign and submit a prepared transaction. Use after 'prepare'. Sends seed over network — HTTPS only.

hash.description: Transaction hash returned by the 'prepare' tool (hex string)

seed.description: Ed25519 seed (64 hex chars) used to sign the transaction. SECURITY: Only submit this over HTTPS to a trusted peer!

value.description: Resulting CVM value from transaction execution

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the transaction failed

info.description: Additional execution metadata including juice used, fees, and transaction hash
